title: Cuneiform Tablet #0608: Old Babylonian Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
